# Skill: Architecture Framing (DDD)

## Purpose
Set architectural context before technical details.

## Input
- Project structure
- Domain description
- Technology stack

## Output
- 3–5 slides max
- Principles before structure
- Domain before frameworks

## Rules
- Do NOT list packages verbatim
- Translate structure into intent
- Use domain language, not technical jargon
- Explicitly state architectural constraints

## Anti-patterns
- Folder trees on slides
- Explaining Spring annotations first
- “Clean Architecture” buzzwords without meaning
